phrases.french: Un billet pour Nice, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.phonetic: un bee-YEH poor NEES, seel voo PLAY
phrases.context: Menton is on the main Marseille–Ventimiglia line. Nice is about 35 minutes by regional train (TER).

phrases.english: Does this train go to Italy?
phrases.context: Some regional trains continue to Ventimiglia (Italy), just across the border. You don't need a separate ticket — just a valid EU rail pass or ticket.

phrases.french: Quel est le prochain train pour Monaco ?
phrases.english: What is the next train to Monaco?
phrases.phonetic: kel eh luh pro-SHAN tran poor moh-nah-KOH
phrases.context: Monaco is about 20 minutes by train from Menton. Trains run frequently throughout the day.

tips: Always validate (composter) your ticket before boarding — yellow machines on the platform
Nice is 35 min, Monaco is 20 min, Ventimiglia (Italy) is 10 min
The station is a short walk from the old town and beach
